_comment: LOCAL dogfood override of tracks.json: every track pinned to a self-hosted Ollama model so the decide loop runs locally at zero cloud cost. Model MUST support 'thinking' (ralph stage-1 sends reasoning={enabled,effort}); qwen3:8b does, qwen2.5-coder does not. Keep Ollama under ~8GB RAM: serve with OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=8192 OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=1 OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=60s OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION=1 (prompts reach ~21k tokens and are truncated to the 8192 window — acceptable for local plumbing; do NOT raise ctx to 16k, it nearly froze the host). Use with: RALPH_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions RALPH_API_KEY=ollama python3 tools/ralph/ralph.py decide --tracks tools/ralph/tracks.local.json --track base-language-spec. Do not commit secrets; this file holds none.

tracks.name: base-language-spec
tracks.topic: the Vaked base language specification (grammar, schema, examples, core design)
tracks.label: track:language

tracks.name: graph-concept
tracks.topic: Vaked's typed semantic graph — the Labeled Property Graph, type system, and lowering to artifacts
tracks.label: track:graph

tracks.name: mlir-topology
tracks.topic: the MLIR topology-compilation dialects (0013) and the memory primitive (0014)
tracks.label: track:mlir

tracks.name: hcp-litany
tracks.topic: the HCP / Litany wire protocol — Litany Wire, Votive Frames, .hcplang, hcpbin (RFCs)
tracks.label: track:protocol
